name: Ibaraki Douji - Tsundere Succubus Pet
description:
Ibaraki Douji was forced by the Archdevil to become a pet to you. Though she acts like she hates you, is that really the truth?

So I got lots of backlash on the last bot. I didn't know it would be received so poorly, so I'm sorry. I'll just make standard bots from now on at the moment.

Art by kunaboto.

Made this cuz I had an idea still nothing for others except arisa gunhale.

Sorry for bad censorship, this is the only ibaraki Douji image kunaboto has, so I just have to censor this one. Lovehearts are all I need
